seo.title: Easy Restaurant — Restaurant Software | Resoria
seo.description: Discover Easy Restaurant: tables, orders, kitchen and POS management. Screenshots, tutorials and success stories.

whatIs.title: What is Easy Restaurant?
paragraphs: Easy Restaurant is a complete system to manage your restaurant, café or food truck from one place.
It centralizes tables, orders, kitchen and cash register so your team works faster with fewer mistakes. Built to be simple — no long manuals or complicated setup.

whoIsItFor.title: Who is it for?
whoIsItFor.subtitle: If your business runs on orders and you need faster tables, kitchen and checkout, Easy Restaurant is built for you.

items.title: Fewer order mistakes
items.description: Orders reach the kitchen clearly. Less confusion, returns and customer complaints.
items.imageAlt: Dish served in a restaurant with a clear order flow

items.title: Faster service
items.description: Staff take orders in seconds and the kitchen prioritizes dishes without wasting time.
items.imageAlt: Waitstaff serving customers in a busy restaurant

items.title: Instant cash control
items.description: Payments, bill splitting and daily close in one place — no manual reconciliations.
items.imageAlt: Card payment on a point-of-sale terminal

items.title: Business visibility
items.description: Sales reports, top products and shift performance to make better decisions.
items.imageAlt: Sales charts and business metrics on screen

items.title: Easy to learn
items.description: Intuitive interface: your team can start using it the same day.
items.imageAlt: Person using a tablet with a simple interface

items.title: Grows with your venue
items.description: From a food truck to a multi-zone restaurant: scale without switching systems.
items.imageAlt: Busy restaurant with many active tables

steps.title: 1. Take the order
steps.description: Staff register orders from tablet or PC. Sent instantly to kitchen and bar.
steps.imageAlt: Waitstaff taking an order on a tablet in a restaurant

steps.title: 2. Real-time kitchen
steps.description: Kitchen sees orders on screen, prioritizes dishes and marks them ready.
steps.imageAlt: Restaurant kitchen preparing orders in real time

steps.title: 3. Bill and close
steps.description: Generate the check, split payments, print receipts and update daily inventory.

steps.title: 4. End-of-day reports
steps.description: Review daily sales, top products and performance by shift.
steps.imageAlt: Screen showing sales reports and metrics

items.alt: Active orders view in Easy Restaurant
items.caption: Active orders and table status

items.author: Josue Ruiz, General Manager
items.intro: In Masaya we installed Easy Restaurant at Rinconcito Encantador, a two-story restaurant. Setup took only a few minutes and, after 30 minutes of training, the team was taking orders on tablets, sending tickets to the kitchen and billing at the register with a thermal printer when guests ask for the check.
items.quote: It has helped me perform better, support my staff so they can send orders more easily and make sure customers are not delayed waiting for their food at the table.
items.closing: The system is easy to understand, easy to install and quick to learn. If you want order across tables, kitchen tickets and checkout, this is your system.
